message:
perf(search): defer config load until Text rendering needs it

`br search` was loading the full config layer up front to derive the
color setting and TextFormatOptions, even when the caller asked for
JSON/Toon/Csv output. For agent traffic that hits the JSON path that
work is wasted — config_layer is only consumed by the Text rendering
branch.

src/cli/commands/search.rs:
- Drop the eager `config_layer = storage_ctx.load_config(cli)?` at the
  top of `render_search_results`.
- The early Json/Toon arms now use `early_ctx`, an `OutputContext`
  built with `disable_color = true` (no need to consult the config —
  these formats don't render colors).
- Move the config load + `TextFormatOptions` + colored `ctx`
  construction below the Csv/Json/Toon match so they only run when
  `output_format == OutputFormat::Text`.

Behavior is unchanged for Text output (`ctx` is the same as before in
that branch); JSON/Toon paths short-circuit without touching the
config layer at all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
